programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: Following the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001, Osama bin Laden becomes one of the most-wanted men on the planet. The worldwide manhunt for the terrorist leader occupies the resources and attention of two U.S. presidential administrations. programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A man who loves when a plan comes together, Hannibal Smith leads a close-knit team of elite operatives. Framed for a terrible crime, Smith and his men go rogue, using their special talents to clear their names and find the perpetrator. Hot on their trail is Charissa Sosa, who was once involved with a member of Smith's team and has sworn to capture them, no matter what it takes.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II

programme.desc: Out West, the boys help an innocent maiden recover her inheritance.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes

programme.title: The Big Interview With Dan Rather
programme.desc: Best-selling female country music artist Shania Twain discusses her No. 1 album "Now", released 15 years after a battle with Lyme disease nearly took away her ability to sing.

programme.title: The Big Interview With Dan Rather
programme.desc: Dan joins three of Styx's legendary members for a Las Vegas performance and a candid interview about the past, present and future of one of rock's most enduring bands.

programme.title: The Very Very Best of the '70s
programme.desc: Michael Winslow, Mindy Cohn, Kim Fields weigh in as they help count down the top cartoons from the 1970s.

programme.title: The Very Very Best of the '70s
programme.desc: From gory to heart-stopping, these films had pulses racing in the 70s; looking at a list of 70s horror films as Catherine Bach, George Wallace, Morgan Fairchild, Anson Williams and more give their opinions.

programme.title: The Very Very Best of the '70s
programme.desc: Favorite famous rides of the 1970s including commentary Catherine Bach, Perez Hilton, Christopher Knight, Marion Ross and more.

programme.title: The Very Very Best of the '70s
programme.desc: The movies that had audiences of the 70s flocking to the theaters; a look at which 70s comedies made the list.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Critics and journalists take a look at the career of British rock band Depeche Mode; featuring music videos "I Feel Loved" and "Wrong.".

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Music videos and archived footage of the Foo Fighters.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Archive footage documents the formation and success of '80s rock band Guns N' Roses.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Iron Maiden, the giants of the metal scene.

programme.title: Vinyl Obsession
programme.desc: The Go-Go's Kathy Valentine and rock country singer Brantley Gilbert talk about their musical influences before picking their five favorite albums.

programme.title: Vinyl Obsession
programme.desc: MTV alumnus Dan Cortese and multi-genre musician Hunter Hayes hunt down their top five vinyl while discussing pop classics of all genres.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: Lizzy Hale dives into the start of a new decade, 1970; a look at the year's ups and downs as the world creates music in response to the Vietnam War, four Beatles go solo and the Jackson 5 hit the studio.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: The year 1971, where each member of The Beatles starts their solo journey as well as women hitting the stage solo, the iconic voices of Barbra Streisand, Carole King, and Janis Joplin; Motown takes a stand.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: Actor, writer, and musician, Tommy Chong, heads back to the unforgettable year of 1972; Chong examines the year's trending new genres, iconic artists, and movie soundtracks that propelled musicians to stardom.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: Guitarist and legendary songwriter, Don Felder, heads back to The Grammy Museum, where he explores the year of 1973; Felder discusses some of '73's biggest headlines.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Asking if Napster destroyed the concept of albums, but ultimately saved the music industry; the death of Keith Moon's chauffeur; the people behind "Who Let the Dogs Out?".

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: What is the true story behind Billy Ray Cyrus' smash hit Achy Breaky Heart?; who is responsible for Janet Jackson's wardrobe malfunction?; did Led Zeppelin really worship Satan?

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Rock experts including Poison's Rikki Rockett, Matt Pinfield and Lita Ford count down the best songs about drinking.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Find out which Rock Star Collaborations make our list as rock experts Caleb Quaye guitarist for Elton John, Bob Lefsetz and Lita Ford count us down!

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mel Gibson) and his estranged daughter (Erin Moriarty) go on the run from her drug-dealing boyfriend (Diego Luna) and his vicious cartel.

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin'

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

programme.title: Mike Wallace Is Here
programme.desc: For over half a century, "60 Minutes" fearsome newsman Mike Wallace went head-to-head with the world's most influential figures. Relying exclusively on archival footage, the film interrogates the interrogator, tracking Mike's storied career and troubled personal life while unpacking how broadcast journalism evolved to today's precarious tipping point.

programme.title: Lady Bird
programme.desc: A teenager (Saoirse Ronan) navigates a loving but turbulent relationship with her strong-willed mother (Laurie Metcalf) over the course of an eventful and poignant senior year of high school.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfor

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: Love, Simon
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online. Resolving both issues proves hilarious, terrifying and life-changing.

programme.title: Nico, 1988
programme.desc: Approaching age 50, singer/songwriter Nico leads a solitary existence -- far from her days as a Warhol superstar and celebrated vocalist for the Velvet Underground in the 1960s. Her life and career on the fringes, Nico's new manager convinces her to hit the road again and tour in Europe to promote her latest album. Struggling with demons and the consequences of a muddled life, she longs to rebuild

programme.title: Won't Back Down
programme.desc: Jamie Fitzpatrick and Nona Alberts are two women from opposite sides of the social and economic track, but they have one thing in common: a mission to fix their community's broken school and ensure a bright future for their children. The two women refuse to let any obstacles stand in their way as they battle a bureaucracy that's hopelessly mired in traditional thinking, and they seek to re-energiz

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: A money launderer (Stellan Skarsgard) for Russian gangsters asks a couple vacationing in Marrakech, Morocco, to deliver incriminating evidence to an MI6 agent (Damian Lewis).

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: On Becoming a Guinea Fowl
programme.desc: On an empty road in the middle of the night, Shula stumbles across the body of her uncle. As the funeral unfolds, the cousins unveil the buried secrets of their Zambian family in a vibrant reckoning with the lies we tell ourselves.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a sma

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Lured by advertisements for the newly restored Marigold Hotel and imagining a life of leisure in lush surroundings, they arrive and find that the Marigold is actually a shell of its former self. Though their new home is not quite what they had imagined, the re

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions unti

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: When the disappearance of a local girl overshadows the abduction of another, a mother's search for the truth behind her daughter's disappearance uncovers a web of jealousy, deception and corruption in a small town.

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: Detroit crime boss Madras (Chris Sarandon) hires men to smuggle a top secret, Japanese-made turbocharger into the U.S. But Madras' crooks are murdered and the turbocharger goes missing. As he searches for the stolen engine, so does straitlaced Tokyo detective Fujitsuka Natsuo (Pat Morita). Eventually, local authorities catch wind of the case, and onto the investigation comes brash cop Tony Costas

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: While transporting a car from Chicago to San Diego, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) picks up a hitchhiker named John Ryder (Rutger Hauer), who claims to be a serial killer. After a daring escape, Jim hopes to never see Ryder again. programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: Mothra vs. Godzilla
programme.desc: Japan comes under attack from two monsters in a giant monster battle between a rampaging Godzilla and the colossal genetically engineered moth called Mothra.

programme.title: Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster
programme.desc: Godzilla, Rodan and Mothra team up to save mankind from the deadliest threat of all -- a fire-breathing space monster.

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. programme.title: Godzilla vs. Hedorah
programme.desc: Godzilla fights pollution in the form of living sludge found by a scientist (Akira Yamauchi) and his son (Toshie Kimura).

programme.title: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: After a disastrous first date, the only things Holly Berenson and Eric Messer have in common are mutual dislike and their love for their goddaughter, Sophie. When they unexpectedly become her caretakers, Holly and Eric have to put aside their differences and learn to work together for the sake of the child. programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Everyone in the Portokalos family worries about Toula (Nia Vardalos). Still unmarried at 30 years old, she works at Dancing Zorba's, the Greek restaurant owned by her parents, Gus (Michael Constantine) and Maria (Lainie Kazan). programme.title: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). As the years pass, Cash ends up in Memphis, Tenn., with his wife, Vivian (Ginnifer Goodwin), and breaks into the music scene after finding his trademark sound. programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Patsy Cline (Jessica Lange) is resigned to both her thankless gigs and her unhappy marriage, until she meets the charismatic Charlie Dick (Ed Harris). Eventually leaving her husband to marry Charlie, Patsy temporarily shelves her performing career to be a mother. programme.title: The Devil's Rejects
programme.desc: After a raid on the rural home of the psychopathic Firefly family, two members of the clan, Otis (Bill Moseley) and Baby (Sheri Moon Zombie), manage to flee the scene. Heading to a remote desert motel, the killers reunite with Baby's father, Capt. Spaulding (Sid Haig), who is equally demented and intent on maintaining their murder spree. programme.title: Lord of the Flies
programme.desc: Amidst a nuclear war, a plane carrying a group of schoolboys crash lands on a deserted island. With no adult survivors, the boys are forced to fend for themselves. programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab thru the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee Returns
programme.desc: Enigmatic Nanny McPhee arrives on the doorstep of a harried mother, Isabel Green, who is trying to raise her kids and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war. Isabel has her hands full of not only her own three, but also with her sister's spoiled pair. With no time to lose, McPhee uses magic to instill in the children five important lessons.

programme.title: A Perfect Getaway
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cliff (Steve Zahn) and Cydney (Milla Jovovich) are celebrating their honeymoon by hiking through a secluded region of Hawaii. Their idyllic trek takes a dark turn when they find a group of frightened hikers who claim that another couple has been brutally murdered. Far from civilization and unsure who to trust, Cydney and Cliff soon get locked into a terrifying battle for survival.

programme.title: The Daytrippers

programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: Kicked out by his parents, a gay teenager (Jeremy Irvine) leaves small-town Indiana for New York's Greenwich Village, where growing discrimination against the LGBT community leads to riots on June 28, 1969.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: This animated tale follows the relationship between the small human-like Oms and their much larger blue-skinned oppressors, the Draags, who rule the planet of Ygam. programme.desc: Young history buff Kevin (Craig Warnock) can scarcely believe it when six dwarfs emerge from his closet one night. programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the town's children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. programme.title: Knox Goes Away
programme.desc: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

programme.title: Pawn
programme.desc: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: Spare Parts
programme.desc: With the help of their high school's newest teacher (George Lopez), four Hispanic students form a robotics club. Although they have no experience, the youths set their sights on a national robotics contest. He arranges to meet an arms dealer at a diner, where he'll be the only one reading USA Today. programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Margaret
programme.desc: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). Guilt-stricken over her role in the woman's death, Lisa's mood swings from normal to furious, with her angry outbursts mostly directed at her mother (J. Smith-Cameron). programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Beware My Power
programme.desc: When a Power Ring is bestowed upon former Marine John Stewart, it leads him on a life-changing mission. With Justice League member Green Arrow and Thanagarian Hawkgirl by his side, Stewart is thrown into a complicated galactic war.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. programme.title: Raise Hell: The Life & Times of Molly Ivins
programme.desc: The life and work of Molly Ivins, a political journalist from Texas, best-selling author, and Bill of Rights warrior.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his su

programme.title: Superman III
programme.desc: Computer programmer Gus Gorman (Richard Pryor) is hired by financial tycoon Ross Webster (Robert Vaughn) to seize control of a weather satellite and annihilate Colombia's coffee crop. When Superman (Christopher Reeve) manages to thwart the plan, Webster commands Gorman to use the satellite to locate kryptonite, the Man of Steel's mortal weakness. But a missing unknown element in the kryptonite --

programme.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
programme.desc: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive ma

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of an eccentric adventurer who vanished years earlier. Hoping to solve the mystery of her father's disappearance, Croft embarks on a perilous journey to his last-known destination -- a fabled tomb on a mythical island that might be somewhere off the coast of Japan. The stakes couldn't be higher as Lara must rely on her sharp mind, blind faith and stu

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mel Gibson) and his estranged daughter (Erin Moriarty) go on the run from her drug-dealing boyfriend (Diego Luna) and his vicious cartel.

programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. She soon turns to Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people to use their minds and bodies as weapons. Egorova emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow after completing the sadistic training process. As she comes to terms with her new abilities,

programme.title: This Is Not a War Story
programme.desc: Some veterans take part in an unusual art project designed to help them deal with the leftover trauma associated with their combat experiences.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when the Flash uses his superpowers to travel back in time to change the events of the past. With no other superheroes to turn to, the Flash looks to coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imp

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Edward undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. But his new dream face turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Civil War-era western starring John Wayne and Rock Hudson. Union and Confederate soldiers reluctantly join forces to fight against Mexican Emperor Maximillian's invasion.

programme.title: Imitation of Life
programme.desc: Lana Turner and Oscar-nominated Juanita Moore star in Douglas Sirk's powerful melodrama, which explores race relations and mother-daughter relationships.

programme.title: Le Mans '66

programme.title: Midnight Run

programme.title: Sightseers
programme.desc: Ben Wheatley's dark and violent comedy-drama stars Alice Lowe and Steve Oram as lovers whose initially innocent tour of the British countryside turns into a disturbing odyssey.

programme.title: Track 29
programme.desc: Dennis Potter's psychological drama with Gary Oldman and Theresa Russell. The life of a sexually-frustrated wife gets a little too exciting when a handsome stranger rocks up.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

programme.title: It Came from Outer Space
programme.desc: Richard Carlson stars as an astronomer who sees an alien craft land. But nobody believes him - until the cloning starts in Jack Arnold's science-fiction classic.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain

programme.title: Gemini Man

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: "Cleopatra" is a lengthy, sprawling, spectacular love story, helmed by Joseph L. Mankiewicz, depicting Cleopatra's manipulation of Julius Caesar and Marc Antony in her ill-fated attempt to save the Egyptian empire. This threesome in one of the most famous and gloriously powerful love triangles ever to be captured on film.

programme.desc: In 1986, Park (Song Kang-ho) and Cho (Kim Roi-ha) were two simple-minded detectives assigned to a double murder investigation in a South Korean province. But when the murderer strikes several more times with the same pattern, the detectives realize that they are chasing the country's first documented serial killer. Relying on only their basic skills and tools, Park and Cho attempt to piece togethe

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Silver miner Daniel Plainview (Daniel Day-Lewis) leads a hardscrabble life with his son, H.W. (Dillon Freasier). When he hears about oil oozing from the ground near the Western town of Little Boston, Daniel takes his son on a mission to find their fortune. Daniel makes his lucky strike and becomes a self-made tycoon but, as his fortune grows, he deviates into moral bankruptcy.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Dreamer: Inspired by a True Story
programme.desc: Ben Crane (Kurt Russell) is a horse trainer who is struggling to connect with his precocious daughter, Cale (Dakota Fanning). But then a horse by the name of Soñador suffers a broken leg after its evil owner (David Morse) races her despite Ben's advice. Rather than put his client's injured horse down, Ben adopts her and welcomes Cale into the family business. They train Soñador to race again as gr

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers, Sgt. John McLoughlin (Nicolas Cage) and Officer Will Jimeno (Michael Peña), become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. Thirty years later, boxing promoter Dante Slate Jr. (Kevin Hart) makes Billy and He

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Holes
programme.desc: A boy and his friends question the motives of a woman (Sigourney Weaver) who forces them to dig holes at a detention camp.

programme.title: Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle
programme.desc: Nerdy accountant Harold (John Cho) and his irrepressible friend, Kumar (Kal Penn), get stoned watching television and find themselves utterly bewitched by a commercial for White Castle. Convinced there must be one nearby, the two set out on a late-night odyssey that takes them deep into New Jersey. Somehow, the boys manage to run afoul of rednecks, cops and even a car-stealing Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: The Legend
programme.desc: The martial artist is seen in clips and recalled by Steve McQueen, James Coburn and others who knew him.

programme.title: Day of the Fight
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Crystal Lake's history of murder doesn't deter counselors from setting up a summer camp in the woodsy area. Superstitious locals warn against it, but the fresh-faced young people -- Jack (Kevin Bacon), Alice (Adrienne King), Bill (Harry Crosby), Marcie (Jeannine Taylor) and Ned (Mark Nelson) -- pay little heed to the old-timers. Then they find themselves stalked by a brutal killer. As they're slas

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: In Mexico City, a newly modified liquid Terminator -- the Rev-9 model -- arrives from the future to kill a young factory worker named Dani Ramos. programme.title: Mob Town
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie

programme.title: Buddymoon
programme.desc: After he is dumped at the altar, a former child star's best friend takes him on a backpacking trek in the remote mountains of Oregon.

programme.title: Wakefield
programme.desc: Howard Wakefield, a New York City lawyer, hides out in the attic of his home for weeks, coming out in the daytime when his family is gone to shower and eat. programme.title: Mob Town
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps, a lawyer, is recently widowed and grieving the loss of his wife when he is sent to a remote village to put a deceased eccentric's affairs in order. Kipps discovers that his late client's house is haunted by the spirit of a woman who is trying to find someone and something she lost, and that no o

programme.title: Most Wanted
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Set in 1973, it chronicles the funny and often poignant coming of age of 15-year-old William, an unabashed music fan who is inspired by the seminal bands of the time. programme.desc: Frankie Dunn (Clint Eastwood) is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm's length, except his old friend and associate Eddie "Scrap Iron" Dupree (Morgan Freeman). programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. programme.title: Scary Movie 4
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion, with hints of War of the Worlds, Saw II, Million Dollar Baby and The Village. programme.title: Aurora: A Love Story

programme.title: Freedom's Path
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, he's taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.desc: Lifelong friends travel to Key West, Fla., to be bridesmaids in a college girlfriend's surprise wedding. Over the course of one outrageous trip, sisterhoods are rekindled, the past resurfaces, and there are enough sparks, sex and romance to change all of their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown
programme.desc: Motown Records becomes the most successful label of all time after its formation in 1958 Detroit amid racial tension and the burgeoning civil rights movement.

programme.title: Whitney: Can I Be Me

programme.title: Passion Play: Russell Westbrook
programme.desc: Rare footage and extensive interviews provide insight into the dynamic life and career of NBA player Russell Westbrook.

programme.desc: Photographer Ricky Powell captures the music, fashion and art scene in New York City in the 1980s and '90s.

programme.title: The Killing of Kenneth Chamberlain
programme.desc: The events that led to the death of Kenneth Chamberlain Sr., an elderly African American veteran with bipolar disorder, who was killed during a conflict with police officers who were dispatched to check on him.

programme.title: Seaside

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: Maya and her young daughter, Zora, are forced to live underground when Earth is left uninhabitable due to a lack of oxygen. However, mother and daughter soon find themselves in a fight for survival when the truth about the strangers comes to light.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. He joins forces with Katara (Nicola Peltz), a Waterbender, and her brother, Sokka, to restore balance and harmony to their world.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water

programme.desc: A boy and his friends question the motives of a woman (Sigourney Weaver) who forces them to dig holes at a detention camp.

programme.desc: With four beautiful daughters of marrying age, Manorama (Nadira Babbar) and Chaman Bakshi (Anupam Kher) frantically seek out the perfect husbands for their children. (Christian Slater), will try to catch an imaginary serial killer within the island's elaborate facility. programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Police Story (Subbed)
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman must protect a female witness from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work. Jackie Chan and Brigitte Lin star.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Action-packed superhero film starring Vin Diesel as Ray Garrison, a soldier killed in action and brought back to life as a super-human.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for revenge. Sky Original with Bruce Willis.

programme.title: American Night
programme.desc: A highly coveted Andy Warhol painting re-surfaces, triggering a battle between an art dealer and a ruthless mafia boss. Sky Original film with Jonathan Rhys Meyers.

programme.title: 300: Rise Of An Empire
programme.desc: Greek general Thermistocles leads the charge against an invading Persian army in this action extravaganza. Strong language/violence/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler plays the bodyguard tasked with saving the president when a North Korean mob storms the White House.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Andrew Garfield stars as the Webbed Wonder, on a collision course with evil adversary The Lizard. With Emma Stone. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence cause mayhem as they investigate a drug smuggling operation. Action. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Glen Powell and Daisy Edgar-Jones are put in direct contact with one of nature's most wondrous - and deadly - forces. Adrenaline-pumping sequel.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: A bumbling all-American family man takes his wife and kids on a disaster-filled cross-country drive to California to visit famous theme park Walley World - but their chances of arriving at their destination in one piece are looking slim. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Beverly D'Angelo, Randy Quaid, Imogene Coca, Anthony Michael Hall, Christie Brinkley and John Candy.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Coli

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Care

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lind

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: Office worker Craig Waterman meets Austin Carmichael, a local TV weatherman who has not made any friends yet and possesses the natural easy-going charm that Craig so obviously lacks. The men become mainstays in each other's lives, but Craig is ill-equipped for polite social interactions and his behaviour becomes increasingly unhinged. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Kate Mara and Tim Robinson.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: A middle-aged shop worker reveals he has never been intimate with a woman, which prompts his shocked colleagues to set him up with a series of potentially passionate dates. When he falls for a single mother, his friends think he is right on course for a lusty liaison, but his new partner is not ready for a physical relationship. Judd Apatow's comedy, starring Steve Carell, Catherine Keener and Pau

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Frank the sausage and the other groceries are promised of the great beyond. When he hears life after the supermarket isn't as much fun as he thought, Frank the sausage investigates. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill and Michael Cera.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A lazy twentysomething lives off his wealthy hotel magnate father. When the old man decides to retire, he begins to question whether his layabout son is suitable to take over the family empire and issues a challenge - he must retake 12 years of school in 24 weeks, or lose everything. Comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Bridgette Wilson, Darren McGavin and Bradley Whitford.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Kenny Wormald and Julianne Hough bring dance back to the masses, much to the horror of preacher dad Dennis Quaid. Fun reboot. Moderate violence/sex/drug references.

programme.title: Lost In Translation
programme.desc: Bored in a Tokyo hotel, Bill Murray and Scarlett Johansson share an unlikely brief encounter. Oscar-winning romance. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily's abusive relationship is shaken after her first love reappears. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Mikey Madison stars as a sex worker who impulsively marries an oligarch's son, whose family try to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Welsh chicken factory worker Helen's life is a grind, until she gets a second chance at love. Heartwarming musical-drama starring Louise Brealey.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Retired boxer Orlando Bloom returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut program first. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: Based on a true story, a brilliant young man puts his bright future at risk to help his father. Drama with Oscar nominee Chiwetel Ejiofor.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: As they continue to recover from separate traumatic events, two young men gradually start to fall for each other. Contains reference to child abuse.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot
programme.desc: After her husband's death, Barbe-Nicole Ponsardin Clicquot assumes the reins of their fledgling wine business, revolutionising the champagne industry. Drama.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga...
programme.desc: Families, friends and foes discover the lure of the Old West as the Civil War divides the country. Kevin Costner and Sienna Miller star.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. Years later, they meet again in a strangely sweet situation.(107 min).

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An actor undergoes a medical procedure to transform his appearance, but his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare. Oscar-nominated drama with Sebastian Stan.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot
programme.desc: After her husband's death, Barbe-Nicole Ponsardin Clicquot assumes the reins of their fledgling wine business, revolutionising the champagne industry. Drama.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A matchmaker is torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. Romcom with Pedro Pascal and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Dazzling musical biopic detailing Sir Elton John's breakthrough years. Taron Egerton, Jamie Bell and Richard Madden star.

programme.title: Shrek The Third
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre returns as Shrek deals with impending fatherhood and the call to be King of Far Far Away. Star-studded animated sequel.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning animated film exploring the weaves, webs and alternate realities of the incredible Spider-Man universe.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into a bizarre cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads the Smurfs on a mission to the real world to save him.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: The Neverending Story
programme.desc: Brilliant family fantasy, which follows a quiet youngster who comes across a mysterious new book that draws him into an incredible, magical world. Flashing images.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: Jason Issacs plays Hook in this captivating adaptation of the classic tale. Rachel Hurd-Wood plays Wendy, who is whisked away to Neverland by the Lost Boys. Flashing images.(109mins).

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: A group of wisecracking penguins join forces with an undercover organisation to stop a dastardly villain. Animated adventure with the voice of Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: Laura and her kooky sloth family move to the big city with their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. Can they adapt to life in the fast lane.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning animated film exploring the weaves, webs and alternate realities of the incredible Spider-Man universe.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into a bizarre cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads the Smurfs on a mission to the real world to save him.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: It's time for odorous ogre Mike Myers to meet the new in-laws with his princess bride Cameron Diaz. Animated antics with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Eddie Murphy.(89mins).

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Struggling to find his inner meh, multi-expressional livewire Gene embarks on a daring app-venture to find notorious hacker Jailbreak. Animation.

programme.title: Shrek The Third
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre returns as Shrek deals with impending fatherhood and the call to be King of Far Far Away. Star-studded animated sequel.

programme.title: The Neverending Story
programme.desc: Brilliant family fantasy, which follows a quiet youngster who comes across a mysterious new book that draws him into an incredible, magical world. Flashing images.

programme.title: Empire Of The Sun
programme.desc: Spoilt youngster Christian Bale fights to survive a Japanese POW camp alongside American scrounger John Malkovich. Epic WWII drama from Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Rashomon
programme.desc: The rape of a bride and the murder of her samurai husband are recalled from the perspectives of a bandit, the bride, the samurai's ghost and a woodcutter.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: Terms Of Endearment
programme.desc: Oscar-winning tearjerker about the fraught relationship between eccentric Shirley MacLaine and headstrong daughter Debra Winger. With Jack Nicholson. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: Through A Glass Darkly
programme.desc: After being released from a mental asylum, Karin goes on a holiday with her family that changes all of their lives forever. Drama with subtitles.

programme.title: Melancholia
programme.desc: Art critic Keller's radical past comes back to bite when he's asked to assassinate a Chilean murderer. Cerebral thriller.

programme.title: Rashomon
programme.desc: The rape of a bride and the murder of her samurai husband are recalled from the perspectives of a bandit, the bride, the samurai's ghost and a woodcutter.

programme.title: Through A Glass Darkly
programme.desc: After being released from a mental asylum, Karin goes on a holiday with her family that changes all of their lives forever. Drama with subtitles.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated musician Brinsley Forde stars as Blue, a young reggae DJ chasing his musical ambitions while battling racism in Thatcher-era South London.

programme.title: Nineteen Nineteen
programme.desc: When a former patient of Sigmund Freud sees a TV interview with another of Freud's patients, she decides she has to meet him. Drama with Paul Scofield and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Oscar-winner with Ryan O'Neal and Ali MacGraw as the young lovers who defy his parents to stay together, only to face tragedy. Heartrending drama. Strong language.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Oscar-winner with Ryan O'Neal and Ali MacGraw as the young lovers who defy his parents to stay together, only to face tragedy. Heartrending drama. Strong language.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: The life and work of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart seen through the eyes of his contemporary and rival, Antonio Salieri.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A man is thrown into the brutality of prison life when he gets two life sentences for a crime he claims he didn't commit. Drama starring Tim Robbins and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: Dan Aykroyd and John Belushi get on down with a host of music greats on a mission to save their beloved school. Classic John Landis comedy.

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean rounds up his band of crooks for one last heist. Gang member Reuben has been left traumatised and in a coma after being double-crossed by crooked casino owner Willy Bank, and Danny decides that payback is in order. He plans a scheme that will leave Bank penniless, but needs the help of an old enemy. Comedy crime caper sequel, with George Clooney, Al Pacino, Brad Pitt, Matt Damon, Andy

programme.title: Ocean's 8
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of brother Danny, light-fingered Debbie Ocean plans to steal the Toussaint, a $150million necklace from Vogue's Met Gala, with the 'help' of a famous actress. Crime caper, starring Sandra Bullock, Cate Blanchett, Anne Hathaway and Mindy Kaling.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegas's biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderbergh's crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac.

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia an

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: From director Bong Joon-ho, this sci-fi comedy sees Robert Pattinson sent to colonise an alien planet, regenerating every time he dies.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecrafts appear around the world, a linguist works with the military to communicate with the extraterrestrial passengers. Sci-fi drama.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, two brothers return to their hometown, realising that an even greater evil is waiting for them.

programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes returns as the human-vampire hybrid, forced to work with unexpected allies to battle a genocidal group of mutants.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: Scream queen Hunter Schafer stars in this twisted horror, following a teen's reluctant move to her father's spooky German resort.

programme.title: Afraid
programme.desc: A family are selected to test a new AI home assistant, which quickly takes on terrifying methods to keep them safe. Sci-fi horror with John Cho.
